title: Time Zone Errors for UK Customers
excerpt: Are the developers aware that time zones for the UK are wrong? London is not on GMT+0, it’s GMT+1 (BST) in the summer. Currently I am in the UK and it is registering london as GMT+0 - this means all of my integrated book…

posts.author: mattjdaley11 (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml: Are the developers aware that time zones for the UK are wrong? London is not on GMT+0, it’s GMT+1 (BST) in the summer. Currently I am in the UK and it is registering london as GMT+0 - this means all of my integrated bookings are logged on monday as being 1 hour wrong. I’ve spoken to customer support, who were as helpful as you’d expect… But surely this is a national problem?!

posts.author: mattjdaley11 (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, thanks so much for getting back to me! Support just told me to come here and didn’t really seem to understand the issue. I did send screenshots of the issue showing “London GMT+0” but the only assistance offered was to ask the question again here.
